title: Standardize Slide-Out Panel Styling as Reusable Component
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want slide-out panels to have a consistent look across different pages, so that the app feels cohesive and predictable.
description: Standardize the slide-out (offcanvas) panel styling so it can be componentized and reused across metrics, object detail, and other pages with consistent header formatting.
acceptance_criteria: Slide-out panel styling is consistent on metrics page
Same styling applied to object detail page slide-out
ux_changes: Slide-out panel styling standardized across metrics and object detail pages for visual consistency.
implementation_notes: Developer updated both metrics and object detail page slide-outs proactively.
comment_summary: Developer updated the metrics page first, then proactively applied the same treatment to the object detail page.
